title: WeBuildHK
description: WeBuildHK is a Fictional Hong Kong based Server With realistic Transportation & Architecture to Visit!
body:
# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
#   W E L C O M E   -   T O   -   W E B U I L D H K

**A Fictional 1:1 scale Hong Kong in Minecraft divided into countries**

**- Join us ingame at mcc.fhi.hk**
# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

##  RAILWAYS
• **25+** major railway corridors spanning **350KM+**

• Multiple custom rail operators  

• **300+** detailed stations to explore  

• **30+** Custom Train Repaints


##  BUSES
• Largest MTR Mod Bus System in Minecraft  

• 150+ active routes (almost every Citybus route & many KMB routes)  

• 100+ custom bus models  


##   REAL DISTRICTS
Wan Chai • Central • Sheung Wan • Yau Tsim Mong •  Kowloon City • Yuen Long •  Kwun Tong • Kowloon City • Tsuen Wan • Northpoint • Chai Wan • Mong Kok • Whampoa • Sham Chun

##  FICTIONAL REGIONS
Argyle City (Joint Territory) • Gold Coast City • Shiro No Machi • Royku Gaikien • Sunshine Island • Rukiriri • Rosehip Bay • Sha Tau Kok New Town 

 Unsure? Check out the Tourist Guides On our discord!
## Check out Our World Map and Railway map Below

## Bluemap
http://mcc.fhi.hk:8100

## Railway Map
http://mcc.fhi.hk:8888

## Low Overhead Map(PL3X)
http://mcc.fhi.hk:8080

## XCP Government Portal
http://mcc.fhi.hk/

![Picture of the XCP from the Waterside of Kwun Tong](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92fbd49af09e062af9585d3d9ce53e9d8a8d24b9_0.webp)

 JOIN THE WORLD
Become a Citizen • Builder • Train Driver •  
Business Owner • Station Builder • Members for both the Western Union or X.C.P
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 Join the Discord: https://discord.gg/EWHtGxV5yW
